@graph.headline: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and How Does It Work in 2026?
@graph.alternativeHeadline: Answer Engine Optimization: AEO & Generative Ranking in 2026
@graph.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO): Practical 2026 guide to ranking in AI answer engines & generative search. Primary tactics, schema, LLM visibility.
@graph.abstract: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the strategy for ranking brands and content in AI-generated answers from engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity. This article details AEO, its workings for 2026, and a practical playbook backed by authoritative sources.

about.name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and how does it work in 2026
Tracks brand citations across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity in one dashboard
Generates AI-ready content with schema + authority signals built in
Monitors mention-share and sentiment in LLM responses over time

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO is the process of optimizing your brand's content, authority signals, and structured data to increase the likelihood of being cited, quoted, or used as a trusted reference in AI-generated answers from platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: How does AEO differ from traditional SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: While SEO focuses on ranking web pages in search results, AEO aims to have content featured and cited within generative AI answers, requiring adjustments in schema, authority building, and fact presentation.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024][google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: What factors influence citation in AI-generated answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: The main factors are authoritative content, original statistics, use of schema like ‘DefinedTerm’, and clear factual claims attributable to the brand or source.[geo-arxiv][schema-org-defined-term][openai-cite]

mainEntity.name: How can brands monitor their AEO performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Brands can use tools and audits to track how often their brand appears in LLM-generated answers, how frequently it gets cited, and what sentiment surrounds those mentions across platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.[semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: Does structured data increase inclusion in LLM answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, structured data, especially schema.org 'DefinedTerm', directly improves the extractability and citation potential of your definitions and factual statements in LLM answers.[schema-org-defined-term][geo-arxiv]

mainEntity.name: How important are original statistics for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Publishing original, well-attributed statistics is one of the highest-impact strategies for earning citations in generative engine outputs.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: What is LLM visibility and why does it matter?

acceptedAnswer.text: LLM visibility is the degree to which your content and brand are referenced, cited, or discussed within large language model-generated answers; this has become a primary traffic and trust lever as search shifts toward AI-generated experiences.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024]

@graph.headline: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization (arXiv 2311.09735)
@graph.text: First academic framework for optimizing content to be cited by generative engines; identifies citation, quotation, and statistics as highest-impact signals.

@graph.headline: Google Search Central — Helpful Content System
@graph.text: Google's guidance on people-first content, E-E-A-T signals, and the Helpful Content System used to rank pages.

@graph.headline: schema.org — DefinedTerm
@graph.text: Structured-data type for defining terms in a glossary; read by Google and cited by LLMs.

@graph.headline: OpenAI — How ChatGPT decides which sources to cite
@graph.text: OpenAI's documented behavior on source selection during browsing and search-grounded answers.

@graph.headline: Semrush — The State of Answer Engine Optimization 2024
@graph.text: Industry analysis of how brand mentions in AI answers correlate with domain authority and schema coverage.

@graph.name: answer engine optimization
@graph.description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) is the discipline of making your content eligible for direct citation, mention, or use in answers returned by AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
